caption:
Bash & Linux Workshop

Fast. Powerful. Underrated.

Step into the world of Bash & Linux and learn how to navigate, automate, and control your system like a pro.

Whether you’re new or just want to get more comfortable with the terminal, this session will level up your skills.

🎤 Speaker: Izzminhal
📅 Date: 29th April 2026
⏰ Time: 8:00 PM – 10:30 PM
📍 Venue: AGMO Space, Faculty of Creative Multimedia, MMU Cyberjaya

In this session, you’ll get to:
• Understand basic Linux commands
• Navigate your system through the terminal
• Learn useful Bash commands and shortcuts
• Explore how developers actually use the terminal

Once you get it, you won’t want to go back.

Pull up and unlock a whole new way to work!

Register here: https://luma.com/anaa8s6v

caption:
📢 CodeNection 2026 Executive Recruitment is Now Open! 

As an Executive Committee member, you will play a key role in shaping one of the largest student-led hackathons in Malaysia, driving the strategic direction and execution of CodeNection 2026, while building upon the legacy of CodeNection 2025, which drew nearly 900 participants nationwide.

Why Join?
- Lead a high-impact, nationwide initiative
- Work directly with industry partners and sponsors
- Develop leadership, project management, and communication skills
- Expand your professional network across universities and companies

Departments Available:
- Programme
- Competition
- Sponsorship
- Technical
- Media and Publicity
- Logistics

If you're interested in being part of the organizing team for a large-scale, national-level Hackathon, this one's for you! 

📌Apply here: https://forms.gle/sZHtE9XMfrLQzFEU8
❓Have questions? You may DM Jordan, Assistant Director, on WhatsApp (+60142286351) for more info. 

See you!

caption:
Git and Github Workshop

Ready to level up your coding game and stand out as a developer? 💻

Join us for our Git & GitHub Workshop and learn how to manage your projects like a pro! Whether you‘re a beginner or looking to sharpen your skills, this session will guide you through the essentials of version control and team collaboration.

🎤 Speaker: Ms. Sofia Hanisman

📅 Date: April 9, 2026 (Thursday)
⏰ Time: 8:00 PM – 10:00 PM
📍 Venue: Agmo Space, Faculty of Creative Multimedia, MMU Cyberjaya

What you’ll gain:
✨ Understand Git basics and workflows
✨ Learn how to use GitHub for collaboration
✨ Manage and track changes in your projects
✨ Gain practical, real-world coding skills

Don’t miss out on the opportunity and come build, collaborate, and commit with us!

caption:
FCI Freshies Meetup Alert❗

Hey Freshies! 
Your first days at uni are all about meeting people, making friends, and finding your crew.

🎉That’s why Jumpstart 2026 is here — your first chance to connect with fellow freshies and kick off your FCI journey together!

Get ready for a fun, friendly space where you can learn about your courses, explore specialisations, and hear real-life tips from seniors and alumni who know what it’s like to start fresh at FCI.

📅 Date: 11th April 2026
⏰ Time: 10:00 AM – 3:30 PM
📍 Venue: CQMX0001, FCI Lecture Hall!

✨ What’s in store:
- Discover Your Courses & Paths – get the lowdown on your options and plan ahead

- Seniors & Alumni Stories – real experiences, hacks, and advice from those who’ve been there

- Interactive Bonding Activities – icebreakers, games, and challenges to meet friends and start building your FCI squad

Bring your energy, curiosity, and maybe a friend, and let’s make your first step at FCI unforgettable: https://luma.com/uhk8yihf

caption:
Throwback to our session with Jobstreet Malaysia by SEEK! 

MMU students learned firsthand what life in tech & design after graduation is really like career tips, real-world insights, and lessons from industry pros.

Thanks to all the speakers, panellists, and our moderator for sharing their experiences!

Vim Workshop is Here! 🚀

Ready to level up your coding superpowers? Say hello to the editor that developers swear by — Vim 💚

Organized by IT Society Cyberjaya, this workshop will guide you from zero to confident navigator, helping you unlock the speed, flexibility, and pure magic of command-line editing.

👨‍💻 What You’ll Learn:

✅ Mastering Vim fundamentals (navigation, modes, keybindings)
✅ Customizing your workflow with .vimrc and essential plugins
✅ Building a faster, cleaner, developer-friendly environment
✅ Command-line habits that make you a more efficient programmer

🎙️ Special Speaker: Chong Wei Jie — Ex-President of Hackerspace

📍 Venue: Agmo Space, FCM
📅 Date: 1 December 2025
⏰ Time: 8:00 PM – 10:30 PM

🎟️ Limited seats — first come, first served!

Join the WhatsApp group upon registration:
HERE

💡 This workshop is your gateway to coding faster, thinking sharper, and embracing the power of open-source tools. Get ready to transform your workflow.
alt: Photo by IT Society MMU Cyberjaya on November 19, 2025.

caption:
🚀 Automation with n8n Workshop @ DATAi
Learn how to automate tasks, streamline processes, and build powerful workflows using n8n, one of the leading open-source automation platforms.

This workshop is designed for beginners who want to understand automation through practical, hands-on experience. You’ll get to build real workflows while learning how to integrate tools and automate everyday tasks.

What You’ll Learn:
✨ Core concepts of workflow automation
✨ How to set up and use n8n
✨ Building automated workflows with a visual interface (no heavy coding needed)
✨ Practical examples: productivity, data processing, notifications, and more
✨ Running n8n with Docker and accessing it securely using Cloudflared

Before the Workshop:
•⁠ ⁠Participants will receive a setup guide with instructions to:
•⁠ ⁠Install Docker & Cloudflared
•⁠ ⁠Prepare their environment so n8n is ready to run
(We recommend completing the setup before attending to get the most out of the hands-on session.)

Speakers:
👩‍💻 Hannah — Ex-Intern @ LEAD
👨‍💻 Nareen — Ex-Data Science & AI Engineering Intern @ Juara Partners

Event Details:
📅 8 December 2025
🕗 8:00 PM
📍 AGMO Space, FCM
🍪 Refreshments provided

Join us and start building your first automated workflow with n8n! 
Luma link : https://luma.com/cmpn9ymj
alt: Photo by IT Society MMU Cyberjaya on December 01, 2025.

caption:
Docker Workshop

Ever wondered how apps run the same on every machine? Or why developers keep talking about “containers”? 

Come through to our Docker Workshop and get a hands-on intro to one of the most used tools in modern development. 

🎤 Speaker: Wei Jie & Aiden
📅 Date: 16th April 2026
⏰ Time: 7:45 PM – 10:15 PM
📍 Venue: Agmo Space, Faculty of Creative Multimedia, MMU Cyberjaya

✨ What to expect:
• A beginner-friendly introduction to Docker
• Understanding how containers work
• Hands-on session on writing & building Dockerfiles
• Working with Docker Compose files
• Tips and insights from speakers in the field

If Docker has always sounded confusing, this is your chance to finally get it.
Pull up and we will help you figure it out easily!

Join us for the IT Society MMU's Annual General Meeting (AGM) and kickstart the next term of our organisation with an exciting evening!

Discover our past milestones, upcoming events, and how you can get involved in shaping our future activities. Let's connect, celebrate, and plan together!

caption:
🌟 Join Our Club Committee, Recruitment Now Open! 🌟

If you’ve ever wanted to take a more active role in shaping our club’s events, activities, and direction, this is your chance! We’re looking for passionate, committed, and creative students to join our committee and help us bring the club to the next level.

Being part of the committee means more than holding a position, it means being part of a family. You’ll have the opportunity to work closely with fellow members, plan exciting events, contribute ideas, and make a meaningful impact on the club community. Whether you’re confident with leadership, love planning, enjoy designing, or simply want to try something new, there’s a place here for you.

This is where friendships grow, skills develop, and memories are made. Don’t worry if you have no prior experience — we welcome everyone with the heart to learn and contribute.

📅 Applications are open until 31st December
📲 Scan the QR code to apply and be part of our journey.

Let’s build a stronger, more vibrant club together! 💜✨
alt: Photo by IT Society MMU Cyberjaya on November 25, 2025.

caption:
Last Saturday, the Digital Talent (Tertiary) team attended the MD PDTI Tech Club programme organised by the IT Society of MMU Cyberjaya, with support from MDEC, along with industry partners such as BJAK, WPS, iFast, MoneyLion and etc. The session was officiated by Nik Hisham, Head of Digital Talent (Tertiary).
 
BarCamp Cyberjaya is a user-driven unconference focused on technology, encouraging participants to connect, share, and inspire through discussions, presentations, and collaborations.
 
This year’s addition, Fierosta, brought together other PDTI Tech Clubs with the objective of strengthening student collaboration, showcasing initiatives, and creating a more connected and vibrant tech community across institutions.
 
MDEC is proud to support programmes that cultivate digital talent, encourage leadership, and build a stronger, future-ready tech ecosystem.

#mdec #mypdti #barcampcyberjaya2025 #mmu

caption:
Hey FCI Freshies!
(If you just joined the Faculty of Computing & Informatics — welcome aboard!)

We know starting your first trimester can feel exciting — and a little overwhelming. So we’re hosting a special FCI Freshies Meetup to help you ease into campus life, meet new people, and learn what FCI is really all about. 💙

📅 Date: 23 November
⏰ Time: 9.20am – 12.30pm
📍 Venue: CNMX1005

✨ What’s happening:
- FCI Academic Pathway Sharing – understand your study options and how to plan ahead with confidence.
- Insights From Seniors & Alumni – real stories, tips, and what they wish they knew as freshies.
- Interactive Activities – fun, chill sessions to meet friends and build your FCI circle.
Whether you're curious, unsure, or just excited to begin, this session is the perfect way to start your journey on the right foot.
